# dispatch/CMakeLists.txt - libLiteRtDispatch_bstorm.so
# Portions generated by AI

add_library(bstorm_dispatch_plugin SHARED
  bstorm_dispatch.cc
)

set_target_properties(bstorm_dispatch_plugin PROPERTIES
  OUTPUT_NAME LiteRtDispatch_bstorm
)

target_link_libraries(bstorm_dispatch_plugin PRIVATE
  bstorm_core_shared
  bstorm_util_litert
  litert_runtime_c_api_shared_lib
  absl::flat_hash_map
  dl
)
